journey_groups.description: All 69 records in the bounded new-child seed set, spanning pregnancy and birth, financial support and childcare.
example_questions: I have just had a baby. Which GOV.UK services should I look at?
Which organisations publish guidance across this journey?
journey_groups.title: New child support overview

journey_groups.description: GOV.UK routes classified under the pregnancy and birth browse path.
example_questions: What should I check before and after the birth?

journey_groups.title: Pregnancy and birth

example_questions: Which financial-support routes could be relevant to a new parent?

scope_statement: A reproducible, metadata-only demonstrator. Completeness is claimed only for the frozen Search API seed result and the declared one-hop metadata closure, never for all GOV.UK or all policy relevant to a new child.

source_queries.label: GOV.UK routes classified under the pregnancy and birth browse path.

title: Having a new child: a bounded GOV.UK journey demonstrator
